FAQs

Find answers to the most common questions about our homeowners association and community.

Frequently Asked Questions

The HOA manages community resources, enforces neighborhood rules, and ensures upkeep of common areas.

Visit the Contact page or email us at hello@email.com. You can also attend monthly board meetings.

Fees go toward landscaping, pool maintenance, insurance, community events, and reserve funds.

Meetings are typically held on the first Tuesday of each month in the Community Clubhouse.

Reservations can be made through the HOA website or by contacting the management office.

Yes, but pets must be leashed at all times and owners must clean up after them.

The pool is open seasonally from May through September, weather permitting.

Yes, with advance approval and signed agreement. Contact the HOA office for details.

Quiet hours are from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM daily. Please be respectful of neighbors.

Yes, all exterior changes must be approved by the Architectural Review Committee.

RVs and trailers may not be parked in driveways for more than 48 hours without approval.

Violations may result in warnings, fines, or legal action based on HOA covenants.

Still Need Help?

If your question wasn't answered above, feel free to reach out. We're here to assist you.

Call Us

Speak directly with a board representative or our management company.

+1 (234) 567-8901

9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

Email Us

Send us your question and we'll get back to you within 24–48 hours.

hello@email.com

Response within 24 hours

Stay Connected with Your Community

Have questions, concerns, or suggestions? Reach out to Longhorn Heights HOA board — we're here to help.

Get in Touch
